user.title: Symetrix appliance
user.description: Address of the Symetrix appliance on the network.

musiselect.title: MusiSelect device
musiselect.description: Address of the MusiSelect music source. Leave the host empty if there is none.

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: The volume channels to manage. One per line as "controller = name = default %" (e.g. 7122 = Bar = 70). This can be changed later in the options.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance
error.invalid_channel_defs: Invalid channels: one "controller = name = default %" per line, controller between 1 and 10000 (no duplicates), percentage between 0 and 100

connection.title: Appliance connections
connection.description: Addresses of the Symetrix appliance and the MusiSelect music source (leave the MusiSelect host empty if there is none).

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: One channel per line as "controller = name = default %" (e.g. 7122 = Bar = 70). Removing a line removes the channel everywhere.

data_description.levels: One channel per line as "channel = dB" (e.g. 7122 = -24). Range -72 to +12 dB; -72 is off.
One channel per line as "channel = dB" (e.g. 7122 = -24). Range -72 to +12 dB; -72 is off.

add_event.title: Add an event button
add_event.description: Turning the event on loads the Symetrix preset, waits for the delay, then sends the MusiSelect command. After the duration (e.g. the song length), the return preset switches back to the normal source. Blocked while a pause is active.

edit_event_form.title: Edit an event button
edit_event_form.description: Turning the event on loads the Symetrix preset, waits for the delay, then sends the MusiSelect command. After the duration (e.g. the song length), the return preset switches back to the normal source. Blocked while a pause is active.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance
error.event_action_required: Set at least a preset or a MusiSelect command
error.invalid_channel_defs: Invalid channels: one "controller = name = default %" per line, controller between 1 and 10000 (no duplicates), percentage between 0 and 100
error.invalid_levels: Invalid levels: one "channel = dB" per line, dB between -72 and +12
error.name_exists: A scene with this name already exists
